title: clerodendrum buchananii var. glabrum
intro: Clerodendrum buchananii var. glabrum, also known as the glabrous tropical glorybower, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Clerodendrum buchananii var. glabrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water.
